1838150.name: Trainz 2019 DLC - Halloween Night on Kickstarter County
1838150.description:
Its Halloween night on Kickstarter County and you are taking the last coal train from Daydream Mine to the yard located in St. Nicolaas before heading off for the night.

What is supposed to be a simple run turns into a spooky experience…

----------------------------------

This session can be found under Kickstarter County 2 map that's built into TRS19.



Developed by Hiawathamr Trainz Add-ons
1838150.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 俄语, 捷克语, 荷兰语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 简体中文
